strengths: 19 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems across multiple languages and architectures
Demonstrated founder and thought leader with GISCollective open-source platform and track record of technical mentoring through workshops and code kata sessions
Currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, showing active engagement with AI tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms throughout career history; current AI work (April 2025) is too recent to establish recognized expertise
Resume shows IC engineering breadth but lacks evidence of strategic platform-level thinking or customer advisory on cloud/AI adoption
No advanced degree in AI or related field; career emphasizes implementation and craftsmanship over strategic innovation leadership
response.justification: Strong IC engineer with 19 years of breadth across domains, but the Principal Engineer - AI Strategy role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume shows almost no ML/AI work history until the current role (April 2025), making it impossible to verify the depth of AI expertise required for strategic technology advising. This candidate is an excellent fit for a general Principal Engineer role but lacks the specific AI domain expertise this specialized position demands.
